name: Freenergy
short_description: Develop your robot, combine abilities. Fight in turn-based tactical mode, effectively distributing energy. Overcome all difficulties and gain freedom.
detailed_description:
Freedom gives energy, and energy gives freedom.

Freenergy is a turn-based tactics game. In the distant future, battles between robot gladiators have become commonplace. You are an engineer who loves robots and science, but you have fallen into the hands of a corporation. And now you have to create war machines and participate in battles, because this is the only way to save your life and the lives of your loved ones.



At the base you will develop your robot and prepare for battle. Over time, your robot will gain new skills, and each module will be able to use powerful abilities. You have to defeat many different enemies and a large number of robot gladiators. But all difficulties can be overcome when your partner is a cybercat.

Key features:
- Key rivals - robots created on the basis of characters from folk tales.
- Robots can consist of several parts, each of which is a combat unit.
- You have a total supply of energy that needs to be distributed among the units allowing them to perform actions.
- Abilities have a different activation time, allowing you to plan your attacks.
- A huge number of ability combinations for each module.
- Simultaneous activation of abilities for explosive effect.
